description: Likely selects a target object, region, or abstracted grid and outputs a smaller crop or compressed representation. Colors are preserved as a set, though positions may change. Primary structural cue: smaller output. Inferred transformation family: crop/extract/select.
arcDslCode:
from dsl import *
from constants import *


def solve_75b8110e(I):
    x1 = lefthalf(I)
    x2 = righthalf(I)
    x3 = tophalf(x1)
    x4 = bottomhalf(x1)
    x5 = tophalf(x2)
    x6 = bottomhalf(x2)
    x7 = rbind(ofcolor, ZERO)
    x8 = fork(difference, asindices, x7)
    x9 = fork(toobject, x8, identity)
    x10 = x9(x5)
    x11 = x9(x4)
    x12 = x9(x6)
    x13 = paint(x3, x12)
    x14 = paint(x13, x11)
    O = paint(x14, x10)
    return O
